metadata.note: File-based Pact (real pact-broker binaries are unavailable in this env). registryctl pact-verify replays each interaction against the actually-running placeholder service (S-T1/S-T3) and asserts status + response shape. This gates CI (pact-verify stage). Shape = every key present in `response.body` must appear in the provider's JSON; scalar values given here must match exactly.

interactions.description: idempotent kv echo — POST creates and echoes the pair (02 §3 mutation)
